auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Agenty API key used with the X-Agenty-ApiKey header. Manage it from Agenty API Keys docs: https://agenty.com/docs/api-keys/88.

actions.name: add_list_rows
actions.description: Insert one or more rows into one Agenty list.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

rows.description: The Agenty list rows to insert.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for inserting Agenty list rows.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.

actions.name: capture_screenshot
actions.description: Capture a screenshot for one web page and return a downloadable file.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL to process.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one Agenty browser request.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the generated file.

screenshot.description: A downloadable file uploaded to connector transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The screenshot payload returned by Agenty.

actions.name: clear_list_rows
actions.description: Delete all rows from one Agenty list.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for clearing one Agenty list.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.

actions.name: convert_url_to_pdf
actions.description: Convert one web page into a PDF document and return a downloadable file.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL to process.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one Agenty browser request.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the generated file.

pdf.description: A downloadable file uploaded to connector transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The PDF payload returned by Agenty.

actions.name: copy_agent
actions.description: Clone one Agenty agent by agent identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for cloning one Agenty agent.

items.description: One tag assigned to the agent.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the agent.

anyOf.description: Whether the agent is public as a boolean.
Whether the agent is public as an integer flag.
Whether the agent is managed as a boolean.
Whether the agent is managed as an integer flag.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the agent.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp of the agent.

outputSchema.description: The clone-agent response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: create_agent
actions.description: Create one Agenty agent with the provided configuration.

start.description: Whether Agenty should start the agent immediately.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating one Agenty agent.

items.description: One tag assigned to the agent.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the agent.

anyOf.description: Whether the agent is public as a boolean.
Whether the agent is public as an integer flag.
Whether the agent is managed as a boolean.
Whether the agent is managed as an integer flag.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the agent.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp of the agent.

outputSchema.description: The create-agent response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: create_list
actions.description: Create one Agenty list.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating one Agenty list.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a number.

outputSchema.description: The create-list response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: delete_agent
actions.description: Delete one Agenty agent by agent identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Agenty agent.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.

actions.name: delete_list_row
actions.description: Delete one Agenty list row by list and row identifiers.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Agenty list row.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.

actions.name: delete_list_rows
actions.description: Delete multiple Agenty list rows by list identifier and row identifiers.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

row_id.description: The Agenty list row identifiers to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting multiple Agenty list rows.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.

actions.name: download_job_file
actions.description: Download one named Agenty job file and return a downloadable file.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for downloading one Agenty job file.

downloadUrl.description: The local transit URL for downloading the generated file.

file.description: A downloadable file uploaded to connector transit storage.

outputSchema.description: The downloaded Agenty job file payload.

actions.name: download_job_result
actions.description: Download one Agenty job export as raw text content.

format.description: The export format requested from Agenty.

collection.description: The Agenty collection number to export.

modified.description: Whether Agenty should export the modified result set.

filename.description: The custom export file name requested from Agenty.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for downloading one Agenty job export.

content.description: The raw text content returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A raw Agenty text content response.

actions.name: download_list_rows
actions.description: Download all rows from one Agenty list as raw text content.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for downloading Agenty list rows.

content.description: The raw text content returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A raw Agenty text content response.

actions.name: extract_structured_data
actions.description: Extract structured metadata such as JSON-LD, RDFa, microdata, and meta tags.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL to process.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one Agenty browser request.

outputSchema.description: The structured data payload returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_agent
actions.description: Get one Agenty agent by agent identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Agenty agent.

items.description: One tag assigned to the agent.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the agent.

anyOf.description: Whether the agent is public as a boolean.
Whether the agent is public as an integer flag.
Whether the agent is managed as a boolean.
Whether the agent is managed as an integer flag.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the agent.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp of the agent.

outputSchema.description: The single-agent response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_agent_inputs
actions.description: Get the current Agenty input configuration for one agent.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Agenty input configuration.

id.description: The upstream Agenty input source identifier.

field.description: The upstream Agenty source field name.

outputSchema.description: The input-configuration response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_agent_templates
actions.description: List public Agenty agent templates with optional pagination and sorting parameters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The number of records to skip before returning results.

sort.description: The field used for sorting the results.

order.description: The sort order for the request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Agenty agent templates.

total.description: The total number of Agenty templates available.

limit.description: The page size returned by Agenty.

returned.description: The number of Agenty templates returned in this page.

anyOf.description: Whether the template is public as a boolean.
Whether the template is public as an integer flag.

templates.description: The Agenty templates returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Agenty template response.

actions.name: get_job
actions.description: Get one Agenty job by job identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Agenty job.

agent_id.description: The Agenty agent identifier associated with the job.

pages_total.description: The total pages scheduled for the job.

pages_processed.description: The processed pages count for the job.

pages_succeeded.description: The succeeded pages count for the job.

pages_failed.description: The failed pages count for the job.

pages_credit.description: The page credits consumed by the job.

anyOf.description: Whether the job is scheduled as a boolean.
Whether the job is scheduled as an integer flag.

outputSchema.description: The single-job response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_job_logs
actions.description: Get raw log content for one Agenty job.

limit.description: The maximum number of log lines to return.

offset.description: The number of log lines to skip before returning results.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Agenty job logs.

content.description: The raw text content returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A raw Agenty text content response.

actions.name: get_job_result
actions.description: Get paginated result rows for one Agenty job.

limit.description: The maximum number of result rows to return.

offset.description: The number of result rows to skip before returning results.

sort.description: The field used for sorting the Agenty job results.

order.description: The sort order for the request.

search.description: The search term used to filter Agenty job results.

anyOf.description: The Agenty collection selector as a string.
The Agenty collection selector as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Agenty job results.

total.description: The total number of Agenty result rows available.

limit.description: The page size returned by Agenty.

returned.description: The number of Agenty result rows returned in this page.

result.description: The Agenty result rows returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Agenty result response.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Get one Agenty list by list identifier.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Agenty list.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a number.

outputSchema.description: The single-list response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_list_row
actions.description: Get one Agenty list row by list and row identifiers.

anyOf.description: The Agenty list identifier as a string.
The Agenty list identifier as a positive integer.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving one Agenty list row.

outputSchema.description: The single-row response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_page_content
actions.description: Fetch the rendered HTML content for one web page.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL to process.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one Agenty browser request.

content.description: The rendered HTML content returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: The rendered page content returned by Agenty.

actions.name: get_redirects
actions.description: Return the ordered redirect chain for one URL.

url.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL to process.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for one Agenty browser request.

url.description: The URL at this redirect step.

status.description: The HTTP status code at this redirect step.

items.description: One redirect step returned by Agenty.

redirects.description: The ordered redirect steps returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: The redirect chain payload returned by Agenty.

actions.name: list_agents
actions.description: List Agenty agents with optional pagination and sorting parameters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The number of records to skip before returning results.

sort.description: The field used for sorting the results.

order.description: The sort order for the request.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Agenty agents.

total.description: The total number of Agenty agents available.

limit.description: The page size returned by Agenty.

returned.description: The number of Agenty agents returned in this page.

items.description: One tag assigned to the agent.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the agent.

anyOf.description: Whether the agent is public as a boolean.
Whether the agent is public as an integer flag.
Whether the agent is managed as a boolean.
Whether the agent is managed as an integer flag.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the agent.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp of the agent.

agents.description: The Agenty agents returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Agenty agent response.

actions.name: list_job_files
actions.description: List the files generated for one Agenty job.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Agenty job files.

size.description: The Agenty job file size in bytes.

files.description: The Agenty job files returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: The Agenty job files response.

actions.name: list_jobs
actions.description: List Agenty jobs with optional pagination, sorting, and agent filtering parameters.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

offset.description: The number of records to skip before returning results.

sort.description: The field used for sorting the results.

order.description: The sort order for the request.

agent_id.description: The Agenty agent identifier used to filter jobs.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Agenty jobs.

total.description: The total number of Agenty jobs available.

limit.description: The page size returned by Agenty.

returned.description: The number of Agenty jobs returned in this page.

agent_id.description: The Agenty agent identifier associated with the job.

pages_total.description: The total pages scheduled for the job.

pages_processed.description: The processed pages count for the job.

pages_succeeded.description: The succeeded pages count for the job.

pages_failed.description: The failed pages count for the job.

pages_credit.description: The page credits consumed by the job.

anyOf.description: Whether the job is scheduled as a boolean.
Whether the job is scheduled as an integer flag.

jobs.description: The Agenty jobs returned by the request.

outputSchema.description: A paginated Agenty job response.

actions.name: start_job
actions.description: Start one Agenty job for an existing agent.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for starting one Agenty job.

agent_id.description: The Agenty agent identifier associated with the job.

pages_total.description: The total pages scheduled for the job.

pages_processed.description: The processed pages count for the job.

pages_succeeded.description: The succeeded pages count for the job.

pages_failed.description: The failed pages count for the job.

pages_credit.description: The page credits consumed by the job.

anyOf.description: Whether the job is scheduled as a boolean.
Whether the job is scheduled as an integer flag.

outputSchema.description: The start-job response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: stop_job
actions.description: Stop one running Agenty job by job identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for stopping one Agenty job.

agent_id.description: The Agenty agent identifier associated with the job.

pages_total.description: The total pages scheduled for the job.

pages_processed.description: The processed pages count for the job.

pages_succeeded.description: The succeeded pages count for the job.

pages_failed.description: The failed pages count for the job.

pages_credit.description: The page credits consumed by the job.

anyOf.description: Whether the job is scheduled as a boolean.
Whether the job is scheduled as an integer flag.

outputSchema.description: The stop-job response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: update_agent
actions.description: Update one Agenty agent by agent identifier.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating one Agenty agent.

items.description: One tag assigned to the agent.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the agent.

anyOf.description: Whether the agent is public as a boolean.
Whether the agent is public as an integer flag.
Whether the agent is managed as a boolean.
Whether the agent is managed as an integer flag.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp of the agent.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp of the agent.

outputSchema.description: The update-agent response returned by Agenty.

actions.name: update_agent_inputs
actions.description: Update the Agenty input configuration for one agent.

id.description: The upstream Agenty input source identifier.

field.description: The upstream Agenty source field name.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating one Agenty input configuration.

statusCode.description: The status code returned by Agenty.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Agenty message response.
